name: alert
visual_summary: The alert component is a notification box that draws attention to an issue, warning, or success message. It displays a heading, a descriptive message, and an optional close button. Developers can use this component to inform users about important events.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready alert component with the following characteristics:

Name: alert
Description: The alert component is a notification box that draws attention to an issue, warning, or success message. It displays a heading, a descriptive message, and an optional close button. Developers can use this component to inform users about important events.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. dismissible, animated
Tags: notification, message, warning

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
